description: Methylation array preprocessing with the minfi R package and copy-number variation analysis with the conumee R package. Compatible with both 450k or EPIC array data.
author: Owen Chapman;Clarence Mah;Mesirov Lab
plan:
## MethylationCNVAnalysis GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
MethylationCNVAnalysis is a GenePattern module that Methylation array preprocessing with the minfi R package and copy-number variation analysis with the conumee R package. Compatible with both 450k or EPIC array data.

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 6 parameters:
- Required: query.sample.data, sex.chromosomes
- Optional: control.sample.names, control.sample.data, genes.to.highlight, ignore.regions

### 3. Command Line
```
<Rscript> <libdir>run.R --data <query.sample.data> --controlsdata <control.sample.data> --controls <control.sample.names> --ignorefile <ignore.regions> --xy <sex.chromosomes>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: genepattern/docker-r-3-4-methylationanalysis\:1.0

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: query.sample.data
parameters.description: Provide a ZIP or GZ file containing your sample(s) methylation microarray data in the Illumina Demo Dataset folder structure. See documentation for more details.

parameters.name: control.sample.names
parameters.description: Specify a list of control sample names separated by commas if the control sample data is included in the "sample data" file. Otherwise write "none" if control samples data is separate.

parameters.name: control.sample.data
parameters.description: Provide a ZIP or GZ file containing your control samples methylation microarray data in the Illumina Demo Dataset folder structure. See documentation for more details.

parameters.name: genes.to.highlight
parameters.description: A file with a list of genes (HUGO gene symbols) to highlight in output plots. Format as one gene symbol per line.

parameters.name: ignore.regions
parameters.description: A bed file specifying genomic regions to exclude from copy number analysis (hg19).

parameters.name: sex.chromosomes
parameters.description: Include analysis of X & Y sex chromosomes.
